wine_collection.title: Brew 5 different Vinery wines — build a wine cellar with a minimum of 5 wine barrel types

eiswein.title: Brew Eiswein (Vinery) — the full-heal wine that requires winter grapes frozen on the vine

subtitle.text: Vinery has 26 wines. Eiswein heals to full HP on drink. Your cellar is a medical stockpile, not decoration.

description: CH.15 · THE WINE CELLAR
▸ Vinery adds 26 wines to the pack.
Most are food/saturation items with minor effects.
One is not: Eiswein heals to full HP on drink.
One bottle of Eiswein = full heal, any HP amount.
It requires winter grapes — frozen on the vine.
You need Serene Seasons for winter to arrive.
You need a vineyard for the grapes.
Ch15 is when you have both.
◈ VINERY WINE SYSTEM
└ 26 wines: range from table wine to premium vintages
└ All require: Grape varieties (planted from Grape Cuttings),
Barrel for fermentation, specific climate conditions
└ Wine barrel: fills over time, output depends on grape type
and barrel age (longer age = better quality in some wines)
└ Grape Cuttings: found in village trades or structure loot
(Nether Vinery: archived mod — Overworld Vinery only active)
◈ EISWEIN PRODUCTION
└ Requirement: Vinery grapes harvested during WINTER season
(Serene Seasons winter = frozen grapes on vine)
└ Harvest: DO NOT harvest grapes before winter if targeting Eiswein
Leave grapes on vine through autumn → harvest in winter
└ Process: frozen grapes → barrel → Eiswein fermentation
Fermentation time: longer than standard wines
└ Effect: full HP restore on drink (best healing item in pack)
└ Batch production: prepare 8+ bottles before Ch16-17 boss runs
◈ WINE CELLAR BUILD
└ Wine cellar: underground room with Barrel wall + wine storage
└ Temperature: wine keeps better cold (Cold Sweat mod consideration)
Store barrels underground for passive cooling
└ Vinery decoratives: Wine Rack, Wine Press — aesthetic build items
Build a proper cellar: it is one of the best Ch15 builds
▸ The wine cellar is the kingdom's medicine cabinet.
The 25 other wines are pleasant.
The Eiswein is the insurance.
You will use it exactly when everything goes wrong
and you have one heart left.
At that moment, the vineyard pays for itself.
▶ Brew 5 different Vinery wines [check]
▶ Brew Eiswein (winter grapes required) [check]
◇ Eiswein production timeline:
Plant grapes in Spring → maintain through Summer + Autumn
→ DO NOT harvest → Winter arrives → harvest frozen grapes
→ brew → wait fermentation → bottle.
Plan one season ahead. Start the vineyard now.
